title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 15 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 15 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 15 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/12/2025
Today, the DCE iron ore contract fluctuated at weak bias as the main contract I2605 finally closed at 753, down 0.92% fromthe previous working day. Traders shipped goods as demand; steel mills purchased according to demand, and the inquiry volume was better. Overall, the market transaction atmosphere is general.
